channel.title: Python2.7 on ExitCode0
channel.description: Recent content in Python2.7 on ExitCode0

item.title: Python 2.7 end-of-life - The time to upgrade is upon us
item.description: Python 2.7 reaches end of life on 1 January 2020 — no further security patches after that date. How to plan the migration to Python 3 for production scripts and dependencies.
